data.name: Divine Suite
data.detailed_description:
Enjoy around 80 custom H-scenes, illustrations, and animations as you move through ~20 unique characters' stories.

Experience ~80 more unique animations that play during a characters' training and through gifting presents.

Divine Suite is a management sim game where you play as the owner of a brothel working towards world peace.

Dive into intense and heated competition full of espionage, schemes, and economics. Along the way, get to know the colorful cast of characters, perhaps a bit intimately~~

  • Recruit new angels and demons to join you in your steamy endeavors.

  • Assign employees to locations and weigh the advantages and disadvantages of each location.

  • Upgrade each location to maximize profit

  • Train and give gifts to your employees playing special~ animations to make them happy and more skilled. Leading to more money

  • Engage enemy corporations in corporate battles. Spy on them, slander them, and make sure they can't do the same to you.

  • Sell merch created by your employees earning extra money, managing supply and demand.

  • Broadcast advertisements to generate new interest and revenue leading to further economic dominance

  • Forge your own path with a flexible and sporadic game system allowing you to go in any direction you want and have each playthrough feel unique.

Story:

Heaven and Hell have been embroiled in war with each other for the last several millennium. A war that no treaty has been able to end.

As the war has drawn on more and more demons and angels fell. Desperate for peace, both sides have reached a new peace deal - something different... With the new treaty, both sides hope the peace built upon sex and cooperation will end the war.

And you are the unfortunate soul who has been unwillingly wrapped up into it all.

data.short_description: After a long days work, you come home. Ready to finally relax but... Who are they? Inside your house the leaders of Heaven and Hell are talking about opening a brothel together? And, they're forcing you to run it??? It is up to you to run the Divine Brothel and protect a fragile peace.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Core i3 6100
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
